empty.title: No spec files yet
empty.body: Drop your PRDs, tech specs, and acceptance criteria under .devdigest/specs/. Every agent and the PR brief read them as grounding context.

notCloned.title: Repo not cloned yet
notCloned.body: Project context documents can’t be listed until this repository has been cloned. Once it’s cloned, its Markdown files are discovered automatically.

page.docCount: {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} found

preview.selectPrompt: Select a document to preview its content.
